title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NIIT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
